testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
21:40:18.355 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests]: SpringLearnApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:40:18.587 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplication for test class com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests 21:40:19.035 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

:: Spring Boot :: (v3.3.4)
2026-07-11T21:40:19.595+05:30 INFO 26452 --- [spring-learn] [ main] c.c.s.SpringLearnApplicationTests : Starting SpringLearnApplicationTests using Java 21.0.11 with PID 26452 (started by rajpu in C:\Users\rajpu\OneDrive\Desktop\Nurture Cognizant main Hands on 5.0\week4\spring-learn) 2026-07-11T21:40:19.596+05:30 DEBUG 26452 --- [spring-learn] [ main] c.c.s.SpringLearnApplicationTests : Running with Spring Boot v3.3.4, Spring v6.1.13 2026-07-11T21:40:19.597+05:30 INFO 26452 --- [spring-learn] [ main] c.c.s.SpringLearnApplicationTests : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-07-11T21:40:21.605+05:30 INFO 26452 --- [spring-learn] [ main] c.c.s.SpringLearnApplicationTests : Started SpringLearnApplicationTests in 2.609 seconds (process running for 4.63)
